title: 1437 - Conductive Ink Heater
description:
Don't forget that you can buy our conductive ink, my books and other materials for your own experiments at https://secure.workingink.co.uk/working-ink-shop/    - and for the many who have asked, yes, you can also donate to further our work, again through the shop.
Don't forget to check out our other channel found here https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC1E8OmOG17VckoPviOPmkMw
